name: Smooth Swings
about: Smooth Swings is an indoor golf simulator venue in Richland, WA, offering a realistic and immersive golfing experience year-round. They feature 4 premium TrackMan simulators that provide highly accurate data on every aspect of a swing and ball flight. The venue offers a range of services including food and drink options, golf lessons, club repair and fittings, and event hosting for parties, corporate gatherings, and leagues. Bay rentals can accommodate up to 6 players, with hourly rates and package deals available, making it suitable for both casual play and serious practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology provides unparalleled accuracy and detailed swing analytics
No weather disruptions, allowing for a realistic golfing experience year-round
Vast selection of over 300+ world-renowned golf courses to play on
Comprehensive amenities including food, drink, and personalized coaching options
Flexible booking system available online and by phone, with up to 7-day advance booking

food_and_drink.notes: Pizza with fresh house-made dough, and a selection of food available
A selection of beer and wine available

simulator_hardware.notes: 4 Premium TrackMan Simulators using advanced radar and camera technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available for $20.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers its own food and drink options including pizza, beer, and wine made in-house.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Smooth Swings offers golf lessons for all ages and levels, making it suitable for juniors and youth.
